extraction.one_line_summary: BETTIOL Alberto soloed to his first professional victory from a long-range attack in the final 14km, holding off ASGREEN Kasper by seconds
tactical_patterns: BETTIOL attacked solo at approximately 14km to go without prior wins, suggesting teams underestimated EF's willingness to gamble.
ASGREEN chased as an individual rather than organizing group pursuit, revealing lack of coordination behind late solo moves.
VANMARCKE rode domestique for BETTIOL despite palmares advantage, showing EF committed fully to surprising tactical hierarchy inversion.

rider_signals.BETTIOL Alberto: positive: won first career pro race with 14km solo, indicating hidden form peak that betting markets missed
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: positive: finished second despite chasing alone in final 14km, showing exceptional time-trialing strength on Vlaanderen finale
rider_signals.VANMARCKE Sep: neutral: worked for BETTIOL as domestique suggesting EF recognized his form decline relative to teammates
